title: Grilled Chicken Fajitas
description: Savory and spicy grilled chicken and bell peppers, served with warm flour tortillas.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together cumin, chili powder, and olive oil.
3. Brush the mixture on both sides of the chicken.
4. Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, grill the sliced onion and bell peppers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender.
6. Warm flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
7. Slice the grilled chicken into thin strips.
8. Assemble fajitas by placing chicken and vegetables onto tortillas and serving with salsa and cilantro.
10. Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
